data.title: Arizona revives bid for seized crypto reserve fund through House Bill 2324
data.description:
Arizona lawmakers are revisiting a previously rejected bill that would allow the state to manage a reserve fund built from seized cryptocurrencies. House Bill 2324 failed in an earlier House vote but is back in motion following a narrow 16–14 Senate decision on June 19.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/arizona-revives-bid-for-seized-crypto-reserve-fund-through-house-bill-2324/

data.title: EnsoFi and OpenLedger Join Irys Ecosystem for Enhanced Blockchain Data Access
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, DeFi Hub protocol EnsoFi and AI blockchain project OpenLedger have integrated into the Irys ecosystem, a developer of on-chain data solutions.

With OpenLedger's launch on the mainnet, they will gain access to Irys's dedicated datasets, which are permanently stored on a high-performance data chain. This access aims to facilitate the development of robust and professional AI models. OpenLedger seeks to achieve large-scale, deep, and verifiable on-chain data at minimal cost.

EnsoFi's EDAS decision-making, training, and analysis data will be securely and verifiably stored on Irys. All outputs from the agents will be transparently available on-chain. As the collaboration progresses, EDAS agents will be able to leverage Irys's programmable data to discover, collaborate, and continuously optimize their strategies, unlocking more complex automation opportunities.

data.title: SEI Explodes as Wyoming Eyes It for Game-Changing WYST Project
data.description:
SEI, the native token of Sei Network, surged over 10% after Wyoming named Sei as a potential blockchain for its state-backed WYST stablecoin.

The post SEI Explodes as Wyoming Eyes It for Game-Changing WYST Project first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/20/sei-token-surges-10-wyoming-wyst-pilot/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sei-token-surges-10-wyoming-wyst-pilot

data.title: Bitcoin Trader AguilaTrades Increases Long Position to $318 Million
data.description:
According to PANews, trader AguilaTrades has expanded their Bitcoin long position to $318 million, currently showing an unrealized profit of $3.95 million. The trader initiated their third long position on Bitcoin yesterday afternoon, gradually increasing the position to its current level through multiple additions.

The details of AguilaTrades' position include a 20x leverage on 3,003 BTC, with an entry price of $104,820 and a liquidation price of $98,956. Previously, when the position size exceeded $400 million, Bitcoin experienced a pullback of over $4,000.

data.title: Worldcoin Contributor Acquires Dawn Wallet
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tools for Humanity, a contributor to Worldcoin, has announced the acquisition of Dawn Wallet. The wallet service will gradually shut down over the coming weeks, with comprehensive support provided for the transition of personal assets. Additionally, Dawn Wallet founders Tom Waite and Isaac Rodriguez have joined Tools for Humanity.

data.title: Hong Kong Treasury Secretary: The law does not rule out the possibility of stablecoins being pegged to the RMB, but a comprehensive assessment of risks and policy coordination is needed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hong Kong Financial Services and Treasury Secretary Paul Chan said at the Lujiazui Forum recently that stablecoins should focus on solving real economic needs rather than just pursuing technological innovation or interconnection. He pointed out that the issuance of stablecoins should follow similar regulatory principles as traditional financial institutions, including that issuers must have capital, always maintain sufficient reserves, and ensure that stablecoins can be redeemed within one working day.
Regarding whether stablecoins can be linked to the RMB to promote the internationalization of the RMB, Paul Chan responded that this possibility is not ruled out from a legal perspective. Hong Kong's regulatory logic is clear and has a legal basis, allowing stablecoins to be anchored to multiple legal currencies. However, he also emphasized that if such arrangements are to be implemented, the country's exchange rate mechanism, monetary policy and related risks must be comprehensively considered.

data.title: Arizona Senate revives Bitcoin reserve bill
data.description:
Arizona’s Senate voted to bring back a bill to create a state Bitcoin reserve fund.

data.title: Aguila increased his BTC long position to $318 million for the third time, and currently has a floating profit of $3.95 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, trader @AguilaTrades' BTC long position has increased to $318 million, with a current floating profit of about $3.95 million. He started this round of long positions yesterday afternoon and subsequently increased his positions several times. He currently holds a total of 3,003 BTC, with a leverage of 20 times, an average opening price of $104,820, and a liquidation price of $98,956. The two previous times when his position exceeded $400 million, BTC experienced a pullback of more than $4,000.

data.title: Circle's U.S. stock price rose more than 15% before the market opened, temporarily reported at $229
data.description: According to market data, Circle's US stock rose more than 15% before the market opened, temporarily reporting $229. Earlier on Wednesday, the stock broke through the $200 mark and closed up 34.25%. Previously, the founder of Airwallex publicly stated that "it's time to short Circle."

data.title: Circle's Stock Surges Amid Market Speculation
data.description:
According to PANews, Circle's stock experienced a significant increase of nearly 13% in pre-market trading, reaching $225.78. This follows a substantial rise on Wednesday when Circle's stock (CRCL.N) surpassed $200, closing with a gain of 34.25%.

The surge in Circle's stock price comes amid recent comments from the founder of Airwallex, who suggested that it might be time to short Circle. This statement has sparked discussions and speculation in the market regarding Circle's future performance.

data.title: Tools for Humanity Acquires Dawn Wallet, Founder Joins Team
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tools for Humanity, a major contributor to Worldcoin, announced that it has acquired the crypto wallet application Dawn Wallet. Dawn Wallet will be gradually shut down in the coming weeks and assist users in completing asset transition. Its co-founders Tom Waite and Isaac Rodriguez will join the Tools for Humanity team to work together to promote the next stage of product and technology integration.

data.title: ETH long institutions continue to increase their positions, and ancient whales sell thousands of ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, two important entities closely related to ETH have recently operated again: 
1: Trend Research (@Trend_Research_) associated with Lede Capital withdrew 1,197 ETH from Binance again 3 hours ago. Currently, the address holds a total of 140,701 ETH on the chain, which is valued at about $356 million at the current price.
2: An ancient whale address that participated in the ETH ICO in 2015, with a cost of only $0.31, continues to reduce holdings: 2 hours ago, it sold 1,000 WETH again, cashing out about $1.05 million, and currently still holds 32,864 ETH, with a book value of about $83 million.

data.title: K33 Secures $19.5 Million for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin asset management firm K33 has successfully completed two rounds of financing within three weeks, raising a total of 185 million Swedish kronor (over $19.5 million). The funds are entirely allocated for purchasing Bitcoin.

K33 CEO Torbjørn Bull Jenssen stated that the financing strongly validates the company's strategy and marks a significant milestone in its development. The firm is steadily progressing towards its goal of acquiring 1,000 Bitcoins. K33 is listed on the Nasdaq First North Growth Market.

data.title: Binance to Launch Avail Trading Competition with Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch the Avail Trading Competition on Binance Alpha, offering participants the chance to earn exclusive token rewards. The competition will run from 2025-06-20 07:00 (UTC) to 2025-07-04 07:00 (UTC). Participants can trade AVAIL tokens using their Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha to qualify for the rewards. The competition is open to all users eligible to trade Binance Alpha tokens.

Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of AVAIL during the promotion period. The top 12,500 users by purchase volume will share a total of 32,500,000 AVAIL tokens, with each receiving 2,600 AVAIL. Only trades executed through Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha will be considered, and third-party dApp transactions are excluded. The competition focuses solely on cumulative purchases, excluding sales, and there is no cap on trading volume for participants. Notably, trading volume from Binance Alpha-to-Alpha token pairs will not count towards the competition rankings.

To participate, users must update their Binance App to the latest version, create a Binance Wallet (Keyless), and back it up. After the promotion period, rankings will be automatically calculated, and eligible winners will receive their rewards in their Binance Alpha accounts by 2025-07-18 16:00:00 (UTC). Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants involved in dishonest behavior or those who tamper with the program code. The platform also retains the discretion to amend the competition terms without prior notice. Users are advised to review the Binance Wallet Terms of Use and conduct their own research before participating.

data.title: Kroma L2 Network to Shut Down in June 2025, Token Migration Required
data.description: According to PANews, Kroma has announced the closure of its Layer 2 (L2) network on June 26, 2025. Holders of the $KRO token are advised to migrate their tokens from the Kroma L2 to the Ethereum mainnet (L1) before this date. Following the migration, $KRO will remain the primary token for the forthcoming Kroma Protocol.
